_doc: Hand-curated map from a video's normalized name to one or more catalog ME normalized names. Key format: '<class>:<normalized video name>'. Value: a string (single-target) or an array of strings (compound video covering multiple MEs). Used by scripts/match.mjs when a video doesn't match an ME directly.
_community_added_no_alias_needed: paladin:Holy Templar: Holy Power and paladin:Holy Templar: Light of Dawn now exist as community-sourced stubs (added by scripts/add-community-mes.mjs from azerothhub markers); video matches resolve directly.
